{"id":"project-LICHEN-ilmz","title":"DodagConfig::from_bytes ignores A-flag and PCS fields","description":"file: rust/lichen-rpl/src/message.rs
line: 243-256

Per RFC 6550 Section 6.7.6, the DODAG Configuration Option has:
- data[0] bits 0-2: Path Control Size (PCS)
- data[0] bit 4: Authentication Enabled (A)

The from_bytes parser skips data[0] entirely and starts reading from data[1]:

```rust
Ok(Self {
    dio_int_doublings: data[1],  // Skips data[0]
    ...
})
```

The struct lacks fields for A-flag and PCS. While LICHEN may not use authentication, ignoring PCS affects path control interpretation in source routing.

Fix: Add a_flag: bool and pcs: u8 fields to DodagConfig and parse from data[0].","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T17:15:12.407823Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T17:15:12.407857Z"}
